name: python3-shodan
title: python3-shodan
description:
Official Python library for Shodan (Python 3)
Shodan is a search engine for Internet-connected devices. Google lets you
search for websites, Shodan lets you search for devices. This library provides
developers easy access to all of the data stored in Shodan in order to
automate tasks and integrate into existing tools.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use shodan because Official Python library for Shodan (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use shodan as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `shodan [options] [args]` as documented upstream for shodan.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair shodan with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `shodan --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
